summary: Tested Validation page restructure: sidebar shows correct sections, Qeios/SciPost have Abstract/Extract toggles, ICLR Protein and PeerRead under Pairwise show bar charts and h2h tables, Tournament pages have non-comparable note, no coincidence note anywhere, Extract label correct.
passed_tests: Sidebar shows Pairwise: Qeios, SciPost, ICLR Protein Science, PeerRead ACL 2017
Sidebar shows Tournament: ICLR LLMs, ICLR Protein Science, PeerRead ACL 2017
Qeios page has Abstract/Extract toggle that switches modes correctly
SciPost pairwise page has Abstract/Extract toggle that switches modes correctly
ICLR Protein Science under Pairwise shows bar charts (Agreement Rate by Content Mode)
ICLR Protein Science under Pairwise shows Head-to-Head comparison table (111 pairs)
ICLR Protein Science under Pairwise shows AI Pick Overlap Between Modes chart
PeerRead ACL 2017 under Pairwise shows bar charts and h2h comparison (27 pairs)
Tournament ICLR Protein page does NOT have cross-mode head-to-head section
Tournament ICLR Protein page has non-comparable note about different match sets
Content mode toggle shows 'Extract' not 'Extract (Full Text)'
No coincidence note appears anywhere (removed as requested)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validation page restructure complete. Sidebar now organized into Pairwise (Qeios, SciPost, ICLR Protein, PeerRead), Single-item (SciPost), Tournament (ICLR LLMs, ICLR Protein, PeerRead). Qeios/SciPost have internal Abstract/Extract toggles. ICLR/PeerRead under Pairwise use PairwiseAgreementSection.jsx with recharts bar charts. Tournament pages have non-comparable note. 'Extract (Full Text)' renamed to 'Extract'. No coincidence notes.

features_verified.tournament_non_comparable_note: Agreement rates above are based on different sets of matches per content mode and are not directly comparable...
